title: What Scripture actually says about self-control (it's not willpower)
caption:
Most men try to fix self-control with more willpower. It never works permanently.

Willpower runs on a budget. The Spirit is a source. That's not a platitude. It's a different framework entirely.

Galatians 5 lists self-control as a fruit of the Spirit, not an output of discipline. You don't manufacture it. You tend the root.

Kill the on-ramp before the test arrives. Water the root in the morning. Stay close to the vine.

"Apart from me you can do nothing." — John 15:5

Save this if the same thing keeps beating you. The answer isn't trying harder.

#faith #christianmen #selfcontrol #scripture #godlymen #manofgod #galatians5 #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
